scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run copy-renderer && npm run copy-icons && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run copy-renderer && npm run copy-icons && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run copy-renderer && npm run copy-icons && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.js
